rba.name: RBA — Cash Rate Target & Capital Market Yields
rba.description: Risk-free rate: Australian 10-year Commonwealth Government Securities yield (F2); cash rate (F1.1) as cross-check. Feeds the model discount rate.

csiro_gencost.name: CSIRO — GenCost (annual, with AEMO)
csiro_gencost.description: Authoritative Australian battery capital cost ($/kWh, $/kW) by duration. Feeds build-cost inputs.

aemo_generation_info.name: AEMO — NEM Generation Information
aemo_generation_info.description: Full NEM project list (existing / committed / proposed). Filtered to NSW & VIC batteries to ground the illustrative pipeline, and to measure proposed->committed attrition.

aemo_connections.name: AEMO — Connections Scorecard / Key Connection Information (KCI)
aemo_connections.description: Grid-connection success rate and typical duration -> the connection gate probability and timing.

nsw_planning.name: NSW Planning Portal — Major Projects / Application Tracker
nsw_planning.description: BESS major-project applications: name, capacity, status, lodgement & determination dates -> planning approval rate + timeline. Public submissions readable per project.

trade_press_comps.name: Energy trade press — battery M&A / deal comps
trade_press_comps.description: Publicly reported battery deals -> $/MW comps by development stage. Richest databases (BNEF, Enerdatics, Mergermarket) are PAID and out of scope; comps rely on publicly reported deals (stated as a limitation).
